evals.prompt: Check if the mobile and web routes match for all modules.
evals.expected_output: Extracts routes from both mobile and web for each module, compares structures, and reports mismatches in a table format.

expectations.name: extracts-both-platforms
expectations.assertion: Output shows route extraction from both apps/mobile/ and apps/web/ directories

expectations.name: produces-comparison-table
expectations.assertion: Output includes a table or structured comparison showing route names with their mobile and web status

expectations.name: classifies-mismatches
expectations.assertion: Mismatches are classified as MOBILE_ONLY, WEB_ONLY, or similar category labels rather than just listed

evals.prompt: Are there any orphaned web routes that don't have matching mobile screens?
evals.expected_output: Identifies web-only routes across all modules that have no corresponding mobile screen.

expectations.name: identifies-web-only-routes
expectations.assertion: Output lists specific route paths that exist in apps/web/ but have no corresponding mobile route

expectations.name: provides-file-paths
expectations.assertion: Each orphaned route includes the exact file path of the web route file
